Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Known Subinterfaces:
ArrayValidator<A,​E>, BigDecimalPrecisionValidator, BigDecimalValidator, BooleanValidator, ClassValidator<T>, CollectionValidator<C,​E>, ComparableValidator<T>, ExtensibleArrayValidator<S,​A,​E>, ExtensibleBooleanValidator<S>, ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,​C,​E>, ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,​T>, ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<S,​T>, ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,​T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,​T>, ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<S,​T>, FloatingPointValidator<T>, InetAddressValidator, IntegerValidator<T>, ListValidator<L,​E>, MapValidator<K,​V>, MultimapValidator<K,​V>, NumberValidator<T>, ObjectValidator<T>, OptionalValidator, PathValidator, PrimitiveBooleanValidator, PrimitiveCharacterValidator, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T>, PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T>, PrimitiveNumberValidator<T>, SizeValidator, StringValidator, UriValidator, UrlValidator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractArrayValidator, AbstractArrayValidatorNoOp, AbstractBooleanValidator, AbstractCollectionValidator, AbstractComparableValidator, AbstractComparableValidatorNoOp, AbstractDoubleValidator, AbstractFloatingPointValidatorNoOp, AbstractFloatValidator, AbstractIntegerValidator, AbstractNumberValidator, AbstractNumberValidatorNoOp, AbstractObjectValidator, AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp, AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp, ArrayValidatorImpl, ArrayValidatorNoOp, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorNoOp, BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl, BigDecimalValidatorImpl, BigDecimalValidatorNoOp, BooleanValidatorImpl, BooleanValidatorNoOp, ClassValidatorImpl, ClassValidatorNoOp, CollectionValidatorImpl, CollectionValidatorNoOp, ComparableValidatorImpl, ComparableValidatorNoOp, DoubleValidatorImpl, FloatingPointValidatorNoOp, FloatValidatorImpl, InetAddressValidatorImpl, InetAddressValidatorNoOp, IntegerValidatorImpl, IntegerValidatorNoOp, ListValidatorImpl, ListValidatorNoOp, LongValidatorImpl, MapValidatorImpl, MapValidatorNoOp, NumberValidatorImpl, NumberValidatorNoOp, ObjectValidatorImpl, ObjectValidatorNoOp, OptionalValidatorImpl, OptionalValidatorNoOp, PathValidatorImpl, PathValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveBooleanValidatorImpl, PrimitiveBooleanValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl, PrimitiveCharacterValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl, PrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp, SizeValidatorImpl, SizeValidatorNoOp, StringValidatorImpl, StringValidatorNoOp, UriValidatorImpl, UriValidatorNoOp, UrlValidatorImpl, UrlValidatorNoOp
public interface ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>
Validates the requirements of an Object.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    StringValidator asString()
    Returns a verifier for the String representation of the actual value.
    S asString​(Consumer<StringValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    T getActual()
    Returns the actual value.
    List<ValidationFailure> getFailures()
    Returns the list of failed validations.
    boolean isActualAvailable()
    Indicates if the actual value is available.
    S isEqualTo​(Object expected)
    Ensures that the actual value is equal to an expected value.
    S isEqualTo​(Object expected, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is equal to the expected value.
    S isInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is an instance of a class.
    S isNotEqualTo​(Object other)
    Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another value.
    S isNotEqualTo​(Object other, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another variable.
    S isNotInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is not an instance of a class.
    S isNotNull()
    Ensures that the actual value is not null.
    S isNotOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
    Ensures that the actual value is not one of the elements in a collection.
    S isNotSameObjectAs​(Object other, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value does not reference a specific object.
    S isNull()
    Ensures that the actual value is null.
    S isOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
    Ensures that the actual value is one of the elements in a collection.
    S isSameObjectAs​(Object expected, String name)
    Ensures that the actual and expected objects are one and the same object.

  • Method Details

    • isActualAvailable

      boolean isActualAvailable()
      Indicates if the actual value is available.
      Returns:
      false if the value was converted to an incompatible type

    • getActual

      T getActual()
      Returns the actual value. The return value is undefined if isActualAvailable() is false.
      Returns:
      the actual value

    • getFailures

      List<ValidationFailure> getFailures()
      Returns the list of failed validations. Modifying the returned list results in undefined behavior.
      Returns:
      the list of failed validations

    • isEqualTo

      S isEqualTo​(Object expected)
      Ensures that the actual value is equal to an expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isEqualTo

      S isEqualTo​(Object expected, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is equal to the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      name - the name of the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • isNotEqualTo

      S isNotEqualTo​(Object other)
      Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another value.
      Parameters:
      other - the value to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isNotEqualTo

      S isNotEqualTo​(Object other, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another variable.
      Parameters:
      other - the value to compare to
      name - the name of the variable
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isSameObjectAs

      S isSameObjectAs​(Object expected, String name)
      Ensures that the actual and expected objects are one and the same object.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected object
      name - the name of the expected object
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isNotSameObjectAs

      S isNotSameObjectAs​(Object other, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value does not reference a specific object.
      Parameters:
      other - the object to compare to
      name - the name of the other object
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isOneOf

      S isOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
      Ensures that the actual value is one of the elements in a collection. This is typically used to ensure that the actual value is valid.
      Parameters:
      collection - a collection
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isNotOneOf

      S isNotOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
      Ensures that the actual value is not one of the elements in a collection. This is typically used to ensure that the actual value is not a reserved value.
      Parameters:
      collection - a collection
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isInstanceOf

      S isInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the actual value is an instance of a class.
      Parameters:
      type - the class to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isNotInstanceOf

      S isNotInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the actual value is not an instance of a class.
      Parameters:
      type - the class to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isNull

      S isNull()
      Ensures that the actual value is null.
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isNotNull

      S isNotNull()
      Ensures that the actual value is not null.
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • asString

      StringValidator asString()
      Returns a verifier for the String representation of the actual value.
      Returns:
      a verifier for the String representation of the actual value

    • asString

      S asString​(Consumer<StringValidator> consumer)
      Validates nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - validates the String representation of the actual value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null
